name: Herb Bushler
abstract: Herb Bushler (born March 7, 1939, New York City) is an American jazz bassist. He plays on both double bass and electric bass.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Weather Report, Roy Haynes Hip Ensemble, Tony Williams's Lifetime, and the Archie Schepp Quintet
New York Jazz Repertory Company: Jazz With a Spanish Tinge

about_quotes.speaker: Joseph Daley
about_quotes.evidence: I was in the band at that time. In fact I’m on that record. I saw how Howard evolved with Herb from the time the arrangement came in until the time the arrangement was recorded.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joseph Daley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 18, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Levin
about_quotes.evidence: I don’t remember how big the band was, probably fourteen or fifteen guys in it... Lenny White was the drummer at that point and Herb Bushler was playing bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Levin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Noah Evans
about_quotes.evidence: I have the bass, (Herb Bushler) can play the bass with me on Monday night.
